name: Italian Chicken Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
14 1/2 ounces green beans, canned, drained and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Add chicken, mushrooms, celery, bell peppers, onions, and garlic to the skillet.
3. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes, green beans, rice, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 10 more minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Cover and cook for 2 more minutes or until cheese has melted.
